hooks.prompt: If wiki/hot.md exists, silently read it to restore recent context. Do not announce this.
If wiki/hot.md exists, silently re-read it now to restore the hot cache. Do not announce this.

hooks.command: [ -d ../.git ] && git -C .. add brain/wiki/ brain/.raw/ 2>/dev/null && (git -C .. diff --cached --quiet || git -C .. commit -m "wiki: auto-commit $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null) || true

[ -d wiki ] && git -C .. diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^brain/wiki/' && echo 'WIKI_CHANGED: Wiki pages were modified this session. Please update wiki/hot.md with a brief summary of what changed (under 500 words). Format: Last Updated / Key Recent Facts / Recent Changes / Active Threads.' || true
